text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Summer camp begins, and Mejiro McQueen's
heart leaps at the prospect of training surrounded
by nature.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She looks toward the Kikuka Sho and its prelude,
the Kobe Shimbun Hai.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Her enthusiasm and motivation bubble up inside.
